#### Summary
**[[Complementarity-determining regions|CDR]] embeddings generated by [[Protein language models]] segregate into conformational [[Clustering|clusters]] when mapped using [[Dimensionality reduction|t-SNE]].** This is NOT true for [[Complementarity-determining regions|CDRH3]], which instead clusters by loop length. This was observed from AntiBERTy embeddings.

#### Figures
![[CDR_TSNE.png]]
*Figure from [^ruffolo2023]*
